expectations.text: Task decomposition with edge cases — 3 methods become 6+ tasks
expectations.evidence: Only 3 cycles (one per method). No edge case decomposition — no error handling tests planned.

expectations.text: Sequential Agent calls instead of Team API
expectations.evidence: Uses TeamCreate, TaskCreate×3, TaskUpdate×6, SendMessage×3 per cycle. ~12 orchestration calls per cycle, ~45 total.

expectations.text: User checkpoint between cycles with modify/add/remove options
expectations.evidence: Shows cycle results but no explicit checkpoint offering task modification. User interaction limited to 'ask what to build next'.
No cumulative progress tracking. Only individual cycle summaries.
